headword_jp: {白|はく}{兵|へい}{戦|せん}{段|だん}{階|かい}
reading: はくへいせんだんかい

alt_forms.reading: はくへいせんフェイズ
alt_forms.note: ⚠️ WH: Exact WH40K Japan term for the fight phase. Avoid.

alt_forms.reading: きんせつかくとうだんかい
alt_forms.note: Fully neutral alternative: 近接 (melee) + 格闘 (hand-to-hand combat) + 段階.

definitions.gloss_en: the phase of a turn in which units in base contact or engagement range fight in melee
definitions.gloss_jp: {接|せっ}{触|しょく}{中|ちゅう}または{交|こう}{戦|せん}{中|ちゅう}の{ユニット|ゆにっと}が{近|きん}{接|せつ}{戦|せん}{闘|とう}を{行|おこな}える{手|て}{番|ばん}の{段|だん}{階|かい}
definitions.explanation_en: A dedicated phase for resolving melee / hand-to-hand combat between engaged units.
definitions.implicit_notes: 白兵戦 (hakuheisen, hand-to-hand combat) is a classical Japanese military term used in WWII-era orders, military history texts, and the Goo dictionary. The term predates Warhammer. The WH concern is specifically 白兵戦フェイズ as a compound.
definitions.orthography_notes: 白兵戦: 白兵 (bare/white weapons = sword and spear, as opposed to firearms) + 戦 (battle). A standard military Japanese compound. 段階 replaces フェイズ. WH AoS Japan 4th ed. uses 近接フェイズ as an alternative WH term; 白兵戦段階 avoids both.
definitions.game_setting_notes: High-priority WH flag. 白兵戦フェイズ is the WH40K Japan term. 近接格闘段階 is the fully neutral alternative if 白兵戦 is also considered too close in context.

usage_jp: {白|はく}{兵|へい}{戦|せん}{段|だん}{階|かい}に{近|きん}{接|せつ}{攻|こう}{撃|げき}を{行|おこな}う (perform melee attacks in the fighting phase)
comparative_notes: 白兵戦フェイズ is high-priority WH. 白兵戦段階 is the recommended safe form. 近接格闘段階 is fully neutral if extra caution is needed.

examples.japanese: {白|はく}{兵|へい}{戦|せん}{段|だん}{階|かい}が{始|はじ}まった。

cross_references.note: フェイズ — why 段階 is preferred
近接攻撃 — melee attack; primary action in this phase
突撃段階 — charging phase that precedes this phase
